name: Calculateur de Mouvement du Projectile
description: Calculez la portée, la hauteur maximale et le temps de vol d'un projectile.
seo_description: Calculez la portée, la hauteur maximale et le temps de vol d'un projectile. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Entrez vos valeurs pour des.
example_label: Calculate results using the provided input values.

range_hints.v0: Enter value within min-max range shown.
range_hints.angle: Enter value within min-max range shown.

result_context: The calculeted result provides the main output value.
steps: Calculate and display the range result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculetions
